title: taraxacum neolobulatum
intro: Taraxacum neolobulatum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is often used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and improving digestion. Taraxacum neolobulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
